callGraph.callee:
sb.channel("tlkv_public_products")
      .on("postgres_changes", { event: "*", schema: "public", table: "products" }, notify)
      .on("postgres_changes", { event: "*", schema: "public", table: "brands" }, notify)
      .subscribe

sb
      .from("products")
      .select("*, brands(id, name, slug), categories(id, name, slug)")
      .eq("id", id)
      .maybeSingle

sb
      .from("products")
      .select("*, brands(id, name, slug), categories(id, name, slug)")
      .eq

sb
        .from("products")
        .select(FEATURED_FALLBACK_PRODUCT_SELECT)
        .eq("brand_id", brand.id)
        .eq("is_featured", true)
        .eq("is_active", true)
        .order("sort_order", { ascending: true })
        .limit

sb
      .from("brands")
      .select("id, name, slug, logo_url, sort_order, is_active")
      .order
